# cloudflareext_secrets_store (Resource)

Manages a Cloudflare Secrets Store. A store is a container for secrets that can be accessed by Cloudflare services.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the store. Cannot be changed after creation.

### Read-Only

- `created` (String) The creation timestamp.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the store.
- `modified` (String) The last modification timestamp.
